title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official Ollama repo: get up and running with Llama 3, Mistral, Gemma, and other large language models locally.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python client for Ollama. Chat with local LLMs from any Python script.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript / TypeScript client for Ollama. Works in Node, Bun, Deno and browsers.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration to use any Ollama model as an LLM or chat component.

title: ollama-webui (open-webui)
summary: Feature-rich web UI for Ollama with RAG, multi-user support, and plugin system.

title: ollama-cli
summary: Interactive CLI wrapper around Ollama with chat history and prompt templates.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: Experimental GitHub Copilot backend that routes to local Ollama models.

title: ollama-rag
summary: Minimal RAG pipeline combining Ollama embeddings and LLM for question answering.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack integration to use Ollama models as generators or embedders.

title: ollama-n8n-node
summary: n8n community node that lets workflows call any Ollama model via simple UI.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Production-ready Helm chart for deploying Ollama on Kubernetes with GPU support.

title: ollama-docker-compose
summary: Docker-compose stack bundling Ollama, Open-WebUI, and GPU runtime for quick start.

title: ollama-csharp
summary: .NET client for Ollama with async streaming and strong typing.

title: ollama-rust
summary: Rust crate providing ergonomic async bindings to the Ollama API.

title: ollama-go
summary: Community-maintained Go client for Ollama with context and streaming support.

title: ollama.nvim
summary: Neovim plugin to chat with Ollama models inside buffers using Lua.

title: ollama-vscode
summary: VS Code extension that adds a sidebar chat powered by local Ollama models.

title: ollama-obsidian
summary: Obsidian plugin to run LLM prompts on notes using Ollama.
